parent.decision: classified get_mock_data_manager as a mock data runtime facade and compatibility accessor

authorization_subject.ownership: mock data runtime facade and compatibility accessor

future_implementation_lane_if_accepted.title: mock data manager provider/reset seam implementation
required_behavior: preserve get_mock_data_manager as the public compatibility accessor
preserve current app.main.mock_data_manager runtime cache compatibility
preserve fallback manager behavior and mock response shapes
add an explicit provider/reset/test-double seam with deterministic cleanup for tests
keep compatibility helper functions delegating through the public accessor
non_goals: migrate API/helper consumers in this source lane
rewrite service adapters or legacy/facade adapters
change route paths, route registration, OpenAPI paths, response models, or frontend behavior
touch config, scripts, docs/api, FUNCTION_TREE, or OpenSpec specs

gitnexus_impact_sample.method: CLI fallback because MCP transport closed

web/backend/tests/test_runtime_regressio: watchlist mock data success response shape
watchlist mock data added_at response schema

implementation_prerequisites_for_g2_243: Run GitNexus impact on get_mock_data_manager before editing.
Use TDD: first add failing tests for provider/reset cleanup behavior.
Keep all test edits inside the two focused test files listed in this authorization.
Run app/OpenAPI smoke and confirm routes=548 paths=500.
Run GitNexus staged detect before commit.
forbidden_scope: web/backend/tests/** except the two explicitly authorized focused test files for future G2.243

next_gate.if_accepted: G2.243 path-limited mock data manager provider/reset seam implementation

verification_targets.json_parse: this artifact and steward-index.json must parse
verification_targets.markdown_governance: 0 errors for generated report and touched steward docs
verification_targets.mainline_scope: governance-only; no source or test files
verification_targets.gitnexus: detect_changes staged/compare should report 0 affected processes and LOW risk for docs-only diff
